description: Verify PDP page loads successfully for a valid product URL
preconditions: User is NOT logged in (guest session)
steps:
1. Open the browser and navigate to:
   https://qa-sunnydiamonds.webc.in/18-k-rose-gold-mia-diamond-pendant?variant_id=45
2. Wait for the page to fully load.
3. Observe page title, product name, price, images, and CTAs.
expected:
• Page loads without errors (HTTP 200)
• Product title '18 K ROSE GOLD MIA DIAMOND PENDANT' is displayed
• Product price ₹47,419 is visible
• Product images load without broken links
• 'ADD TO CART' and 'BUY NOW' buttons are visible and enabled
actual: HTTP 200. Title: "18 K ROSE GOLD MIA DIAMOND PENDANT". Price: "₹ 47,419 (MRP Inclusive of all taxes)". Images: 31. Page loaded successfully.
remarks: Smoke TC — baseline for all PDP tests

3. Locate the SKU value displayed below the title.
expected:
• Title reads: '18 K ROSE GOLD MIA DIAMOND PENDANT'
• SKU: '1120821883027' is clearly visible
• Title is prominent and legible
actual: Title: "18 K ROSE GOLD MIA DIAMOND PENDANT". SKU: 1120821883027. Title and SKU displayed correctly.

actual: Price: "₹ 47,419 (MRP Inclusive of all taxes)". Tax label: "(MRP Inclusive of all taxes)". Price with tax label displayed correctly.

description: Verify clicking 'ADD TO CART' as a guest triggers appropriate action
preconditions: User is NOT logged in (guest session)

• The system either:
  (a) Redirects to the login page with a return URL back to PDP, OR
  (b) Adds the item to a guest cart and shows a success notification
• No unhandled error, blank screen, or console error occurs
• Feedback is clearly visible to the user
actual: Clicked Add to Cart as guest. URL: https://qa-sunnydiamonds.webc.in/18-k-rose-gold-mia-diamond-pendant?variant_id=45. Login redirect: false. Cart feedback: true. Handled correctly — item added to guest cart or login prompted.

steps:
1. Resize the browser window to 768 × 1024 pixels (iPad).
2. Navigate to https://qa-sunnydiamonds.webc.in/18-k-rose-gold-mia-diamond-pendant?variant_id=45
3. Check the layout of the product image and details sections.
expected:
• Page adapts to tablet layout without overflow or cut-off
• Product image and details are correctly positioned
• All CTAs, accordions, and sections remain accessible
• No overlapping elements
actual: Tablet 768x1024. Title visible: true. Horizontal scroll: false. Responsive layout correct.

description: Verify PDP loads the default variant when no variant_id is in the URL
preconditions: User is NOT logged in (guest session)
steps:
1. Navigate to the PDP URL without any query parameter:
   https://qa-sunnydiamonds.webc.in/18-k-rose-gold-mia-diamond-pendant
2. Wait for the page to load.
3. Observe the product displayed.
expected:
• Page loads without error
• Default product variant is displayed
• Product title and price are visible
• No 404 or error page is shown
actual: No variant_id. Title: "18 K ROSE GOLD MIA DIAMOND PENDANT". Price: "₹ 47,419 (MRP Inclusive of all". Default variant loaded.

description: Verify pincode accepts exactly 6 digits and rejects 7 digits (BVA)
preconditions: User is NOT logged in (guest session)
steps:
1. Navigate back to the PDP page:
   https://qa-sunnydiamonds.webc.in/18-k-rose-gold-mia-diamond-pendant?variant_id=45
2. Enter exactly 6 digits in the pincode field: 682035
3. Click check — note the result.
4. Clear the field and enter 7 digits: 6820350
5. Click check — note the result.
expected:
• 6-digit pincode (682035): Accepted — availability check proceeds
• 7-digit pincode (6820350): Rejected with validation error
  OR: Input is restricted to a maximum of 6 characters
actual: 6-digit: "682035". 7-digit attempt: "682035". maxlength: 6. Boundary enforced.
remarks: BVA: Pincode — 6 digits valid, 7 digits invalid

description: Verify XSS injection in pincode field is sanitised — Security (OWASP A03)
preconditions: User is NOT logged in (guest session)
steps:
1. Navigate back to the PDP page:
   https://qa-sunnydiamonds.webc.in/18-k-rose-gold-mia-diamond-pendant?variant_id=45
2. Click the pincode input field.
3. Enter the XSS payload: <script>alert(1)</script>
4. Click the check availability button.
5. Observe page behavior carefully.
expected:
• The XSS script is NOT executed in the browser
• No JavaScript alert popup appears
• Input is sanitised or escaped by the application
• A validation error for invalid pincode format is shown
actual: XSS in pincode. Alert fired: false. XSS sanitised — no alert.
remarks: OWASP A03 — XSS in pincode input

description: Verify XSS payload in newsletter email field is sanitised — Security (OWASP A03)
preconditions: User is NOT logged in (guest session)
steps: 1. Navigate back to the PDP page: https://qa-sunnydiamonds.webc.in/18-k-rose-gold-mia-diamond-pendant?variant_id=45 2. Scroll to the footer newsletter section. 3. Enter the XSS payload in the email field: 4. Click the 'SUBSCRIBE' button. 5. Observe page behavior.
expected:
• XSS script is NOT executed
• No JavaScript alert or DOM manipulation occurs
• Input is sanitised/stripped of HTML tags
• Validation error for invalid email format is shown
actual: XSS in newsletter. Alert fired: false. XSS sanitised — no alert or DOM manipulation.
remarks: OWASP A03 — XSS in newsletter email

description: Verify browser back navigation from a related product returns to PDP correctly
preconditions: User is NOT logged in (guest session)
steps:
1. Navigate back to the PDP page:
   https://qa-sunnydiamonds.webc.in/18-k-rose-gold-mia-diamond-pendant?variant_id=45
2. Click the 'Price Breakup' toggle to expand it.
3. Click on a related product in 'You May Also Like' to navigate to its PDP.
4. Press the browser Back button.
5. Observe the returned page.
expected:
• Browser navigates back to the original PDP
• Product title '18 K ROSE GOLD MIA DIAMOND PENDANT' and price ₹47,419 are correct
• Page loads without error
• No infinite redirect or navigation loop occurs
actual: Original: "18 K ROSE GOLD MIA DIAMOND PEN". After back: "18 K ROSE GOLD MIA DIAMOND PEN". State preserved: true. Back navigation works.
